source: Audit 5 vòng (workflow web2-thirdparty-audit, 2026-06-24) — discover 6 góc + 5 vòng rà soát + synthesize. Mọi mục có usedIn = bằng chứng file thật.

servicesAuditFindings.issue: Firebase Firestore listed as active Web 2.0 data storage — OUTDATED
servicesAuditFindings.resolution: Firestore inventory entry now: 'LEGACY/drained cho Web 2.0 — data đã chuyển sang Postgres web2_* (2026-06-14). Còn ACTIVE: collection pancake_tokens/accounts (token Pancake).' plan Spark, costMonth 0.

servicesAuditFindings.issue: MISSING 10+ ACTIVE AI/MEDIA SERVICES used by Web 2.0
servicesAuditFindings.resolution: Added consolidated inventory entry 'AI / LLM / TTS / Media (đa nhà cung cấp)' (Gemini/Groq/OpenRouter/ElevenLabs/Vivibe/Pollinations…) deferring to tab 'Bên thứ 3' — nơi liệt kê đầy đủ 70 bên thứ 3 (AI/LLM 7, TTS 4, media-gen 7, stock 3).

servicesAuditFindings.issue: web2Db purpose text inaccurate — says '78+ entities' but doesn't reflect Postgres table schema reality
servicesAuditFindings.resolution: web2Db purpose now lists real tables (web2_products/variants/so_order/supplier_meta/ledger/customers/customer_wallets/wallet_transactions/balance_history/users/records + native_orders/fast_sale_orders). Bỏ text '78+ entities'.

servicesAuditFindings.issue: Firebase Auth purpose mentions 'Web 2.0 fallback' — MISLEADING after DB migration
servicesAuditFindings.resolution: Firebase Auth purpose now: 'Auth Web 1.0 (AuthManager). Web 2.0 dùng auth Postgres riêng (web2_users + web2_user_sessions, x-web2-token) — KHÔNG còn phụ thuộc Firebase Auth.'

servicesAuditFindings.issue: DUPLICATE Postgres entries — confusing pool/instance names
servicesAuditFindings.resolution: 2 entry phân biệt rõ: 'Render Postgres (Web 1.0)' poolKey chatDb vs '(Web 2.0)' poolKey web2Db, kèm host riêng. Không phải trùng — 2 DB thật đã tách (cutover 2026-06-03).

servicesAuditFindings.issue: Cloudflare Workers purpose outdated — claims 'TPOS/Pancake/FB proxy, Edge Cache' only but also serves Web 2.0 routes
servicesAuditFindings.resolution: Cloudflare purpose now: 'chatomni-proxy — proxy CHUNG: TPOS/Pancake/FB (Web 1.0) + route /api/web2-* → web2-api (Web 2.0). Match path Web 2.0 tường minh TRƯỚC catch-all TPOS.'

servicesAuditFindings.issue: Missing SePay integration detail — critical for Web 2.0 wallet
servicesAuditFindings.resolution: Added SePay entry (category payment; 589.000đ/tháng ≈ $24; 2 kênh độc lập shop+Home; webhook biến động số dư → nạp ví web2_customer_wallets + Sổ quỹ).

servicesAuditFindings.issue: Bunny CDN purpose mentions 'CHỈ AI KOL Studio' but doesn't mention it's still active
servicesAuditFindings.resolution: Bunny entry: plan 'Pay-as-go' + costMonth '~1' báo hiệu ACTIVE; purpose 'CHỈ AI KOL Studio (Web 1.0) — n2store-aikol zone. Web 2.0 KHÔNG dùng (ảnh lưu Postgres bytea).'

servicesAuditFindings.issue: GitHub Pages outdated — claims 'nhijudyshop.github.io/n2store' but live at 'nhijudy.store' only now
servicesAuditFindings.resolution: GitHub Pages purpose now: 'Host frontend tĩnh (deploy qua git push). Domain chính hiện tại: nhijudy.store. Repo: nhijudyshop/n2store.'

thirdParties.name: ChatAnywhere (GPT_API_free)
thirdParties.costDetail: Free tier ~200 req/day per IP+key; GPT-4o-mini, GPT-4, DeepSeek V3/R1.
thirdParties.notes: Free OpenAI-compatible proxy via GitHub OAuth. Base URL override support (.org/.tech variants).

thirdParties.name: Cloudflare Workers AI (Flux / SDXL)
thirdParties.costDetail: Free tier ~10k neurons/day per account; multiple free accounts rotated to pool quota. Flux-1-schnell / SDXL-Lightning image generation.
thirdParties.notes: Flux-1-schnell / SDXL-Lightning image generation. Account+token rotation across free accounts. HIDDEN from services-overview per user request (2026-06-24).

thirdParties.name: DeepSeek API
thirdParties.costDetail: Paid LLM (pay-per-token). Used for reasoning, OCR, caption fallback.
thirdParties.notes: Paid LLM for reasoning/OCR/caption fallback.

thirdParties.name: Google Gemini API (Chat + Nano Banana)
thirdParties.costDetail: Free tier ~1500 req/day per key; multi-key rotation aggregates quota. WEB2_GEMINI_API_KEY5 reserved as paid pool for Nano Banana image generation (gemini-2.5-flash-image).
thirdParties.notes: Server-side chat (gemini-2.5-flash / 2.5-flash-lite) + AI script/product-description generation. Multi-key round-robin failover. Image-generation pool kept separate (Nano Banana entry).

thirdParties.name: Google Translate API (Public)
thirdParties.costDetail: Free public gtx endpoint, no API key (best-effort, user-agent required).
thirdParties.notes: Fallback translation (translate.googleapis.com/translate_a/single) when LLM providers fail.

thirdParties.name: Groq LLM API
thirdParties.costDetail: Free tier ~30 req/min; GPT-OSS, Llama 3.3, vision models. Multi-key rotation (up to 10).
thirdParties.notes: Free LLM (baseURL https://api.groq.com/openai/v1). Used for chat + translation. Multi-key failover.

thirdParties.name: OpenRouter LLM API
thirdParties.costDetail: Free credits with 29+ :free models (GPT-OSS-20B, DeepSeek-R1, Llama, Qwen). Multi-key rotation.
thirdParties.notes: Aggregated LLM endpoint (baseURL https://openrouter.ai/api/v1, requires HTTP-Referer). 29+ free models, no credit card.

thirdParties.name: Bootstrap CSS
thirdParties.notes: v5.3.0 CSS framework (Web 1.0 delivery-report).

thirdParties.name: Chart.js
thirdParties.notes: v4.4.6 / v4.4.0 - data visualization for dashboards.

thirdParties.name: jszip
thirdParties.notes: v3.10.1 (esm.sh) - ZIP creation for batch image exports.

thirdParties.name: Lucide Icons
thirdParties.notes: UMD build v0.294.0 - icon library used throughout web2 UI.

thirdParties.name: mp4-muxer
thirdParties.notes: v5 - on-device MP4 muxing for video encoding/export.

thirdParties.name: Sortable.js
thirdParties.notes: v1.15.0 - drag-and-drop sorting (shared navigation).

thirdParties.name: Pancake CRM (Pages.fm)
thirdParties.costDetail: Free tier for basic ops; paid tiers. Credentials AES-256-GCM encrypted, auto-token.
thirdParties.notes: Livestream + Facebook Messenger/Instagram DM CRM (pancake.vn/api/v1, account.pancake.vn). Read posts/comments/conversations. Proxied via chatomni-proxy worker.

thirdParties.name: TPOS (Tomato POS) OData API
thirdParties.costDetail: Commerce platform subscription; exports via OData API. Proxied via worker (Web 1.0 uses real TPOS).
thirdParties.notes: OData API for products, partners, orders. Real-time product sync, Socket.IO WebSocket integration. Web 2.0 reads via proxy (does not write to TPOS); Web 1.0 uses TPOS as prod.

thirdParties.name: Font Awesome
thirdParties.notes: v6.4.0 / v6.5.1 icon library (Web 1.0 pages).

thirdParties.name: Google Fonts
thirdParties.notes: Multiple families (Inter, Manrope, plus BIZ UDGothic/Sarabun/Courier Prime for receipts) via fonts.googleapis.com + fonts.gstatic.com preconnect.

thirdParties.name: Bunny CDN
thirdParties.costDetail: Pay-as-go: ~$0.01/GB/month storage + $0.005-0.03/GB egress.
thirdParties.notes: Storage + CDN (n2store-aikol.b-cdn.net, Singapore). Used ONLY for AI KOL Studio (Web 1.0); not permitted for other features per policy.

thirdParties.name: Cloudflare Worker (chatomni-proxy)
thirdParties.costDetail: Free tier 100k req/day; paid $5/month for 10M req/month.
thirdParties.notes: Primary API proxy (chatomni-proxy.nhijudyshop.workers.dev) for Pancake/TPOS/Facebook + forwards /api/web2-* to web2-api. Shared by both layers.

thirdParties.name: Firebase Authentication
thirdParties.costDetail: Spark Free: 50k MAU; $0.0055/MAU above.
thirdParties.notes: Web 1.0 legacy auth (AuthManager). Web 2.0 uses token-based auth (web2_auth + /api/web2-users), not Firebase.

thirdParties.name: Firebase Firestore
thirdParties.costDetail: Spark Free: 1GB, 50k reads/20k writes/day; pay-as-you-go above.
thirdParties.notes: Web 1.0 legacy (chat/orders-report) + shared Pancake token cache (pancake_tokens/accounts). Web 2.0 FULLY MIGRATED to Postgres (2026-06-14); old web2_* Firestore docs drained/legacy. No live Web 2.0 listeners.

thirdParties.name: Firebase Storage
thirdParties.costDetail: Spark Free tier; migrated away.
thirdParties.notes: Legacy, migrated to PostgreSQL BYTEA. No longer actively used.

thirdParties.name: GitHub Pages
thirdParties.costDetail: 100 GB/month bandwidth, 10 builds/hour (free public repo).
thirdParties.notes: Static frontend hosting (nhijudyshop.github.io/n2store, 301 to nhijudy.store). CI/CD deploys ~2-4 min after push to main.

thirdParties.name: jsDelivr CDN
thirdParties.costDetail: Free CDN for npm packages and GitHub repos.
thirdParties.notes: Delivery CDN hosting most lazy-loaded libs (JsBarcode, QRCode, Tesseract, Transformers, TensorFlow, MediaPipe, etc.). Listed as the shared transport, not a logic dependency.

thirdParties.name: Render Backend (n2store-fallback / web2-api)
thirdParties.costDetail: ~$7/month (Starter) for n2store-fallback; web2-api + web2-realtime services.
thirdParties.notes: Node/Express API server(s): n2store-fallback (general), web2-api-kv04.onrender.com (Web 2.0 API), web2-realtime.onrender.com (SSE relay). Hosts REST routes, SSE hubs, cron, WebSocket relays, SePay webhooks, TPOS proxy.

thirdParties.name: Render Postgres (Web 1.0)
thirdParties.costDetail: ~$19/month (Basic 1GB, Singapore region).
thirdParties.notes: Primary DB for Web 1.0 (orders-report, inbox, chat, customers, balance_history, customer_wallets). DB: n2store-chat-db (pool chatDb), Singapore.

thirdParties.name: Render Postgres (Web 2.0)
thirdParties.costDetail: ~$19/month (Basic 1GB, Singapore region).
thirdParties.notes: Dedicated DB for all Web 2.0 data (pool web2Db, web2_* tables). Fully separated from Web 1.0 (2026-06-03).

thirdParties.name: DiceBear Avatars
thirdParties.costDetail: Free SVG avatar generation, no API key required.
thirdParties.notes: Deterministic seed-based avatar generation (api.dicebear.com 10.x), 18+ styles, schema-driven customizer. Accessed from both web1 and web2.

thirdParties.name: FAL.ai BiRefNet Cutout
thirdParties.costDetail: Free tier currently available; full HD, no watermark.
thirdParties.notes: State-of-the-art background removal (BiRefNet/v2) via fal.run sync API. Server-side cloud cutout (HD option).

thirdParties.name: Nano Banana (Gemini Image)
thirdParties.costDetail: Paid image generation/editing via gemini-2.5-flash-image. Separate quota pool from free chat keys; daily limit via WEB2_NANOBANANA_DAILY_LIMIT.
thirdParties.notes: Image generation/editing. Pool separated to prevent burning free chat quota; gated by RESTRICTED_ACTIONS + per-day quota.

thirdParties.name: Photopea (Photo Editor)
thirdParties.costDetail: Free web-based editor; pro features paid.
thirdParties.notes: Embedded Photopea editor via iframe; config passed through URL fragment.

thirdParties.name: PhotoRoom API
thirdParties.costDetail: Sandbox free with watermark; production tier paid.
thirdParties.notes: Background removal cutout service. Sandbox free (watermarked), production paid.

thirdParties.name: Pollinations AI (Image)
thirdParties.costDetail: 100% free, no key required; optional bearer token for higher tier. Token rotation supported.
thirdParties.notes: Free image generation (Flux) via image.pollinations.ai. Without token: anon URL to browser; with token: server proxy returns dataUrl (hides token).

thirdParties.name: Remove.bg (withoutbg.com)
thirdParties.costDetail: Free tier ~50 images/month per key; full HD, no watermark. Multi-key rotation.
thirdParties.notes: Background removal (api.withoutbg.com base64 endpoint). Multi-key rotation.

thirdParties.name: Facebook Graph API
thirdParties.costDetail: Free tier for business pages; rate limits apply. App reuses FB_APP_ID/SECRET; page tokens stored in web2_fb_post_tokens DB.
thirdParties.notes: Publish/schedule posts (Graph v21.0) + FB ads stats. Connect via user token (pages_manage_posts) to page token.

thirdParties.name: Telegram Bot API
thirdParties.costDetail: Free bot API for admin notifications + delivery report bot.
thirdParties.notes: Bot with Gemini AI backend, admin notifications, delivery-report alerts.

thirdParties.name: Zalo Messaging
thirdParties.costDetail: Free personal accounts (zca-js, unofficial with ban risk) + Official Account (OA / ZNS).
thirdParties.notes: Personal account via zca-js (login through chat.zalo.me browser session; session stored Postgres web2_zalo_accounts) + OA API (ZNS, oauth.zaloapp.com). Monitored via WebSocket with auto-reconnect.

thirdParties.name: @imgly/background-removal
thirdParties.notes: v1.5.5 (esm.sh) on-device/cloud HD background removal, optional engine alongside MediaPipe segmentation. AGPL acceptable for internal-only use.

thirdParties.name: Hugging Face Transformers.js
thirdParties.notes: On-device ONNX/WASM inference (v3.x, jsDelivr). Runs MMS-TTS-vie (Vietnamese TTS), SlimSAM (segmentation), TrOCR handwriting. Lazy-loaded.

thirdParties.name: MediaPipe Tasks Vision
thirdParties.notes: On-device vision (v0.10.18, jsDelivr/storage.googleapis.com): ObjectDetector (EfficientDet-Lite0 COCO80 for product counting), FaceLandmarker (478 points for beauty), Selfie Segmentation (legacy fallback v0.1.x). GPU with CPU fallback.

thirdParties.name: SlimSAM
thirdParties.notes: Segment Anything (slim variant Xenova/slimsam-77-uniform) via transformers.js. Precise foreground/background selection with touch in photo-studio.

thirdParties.name: TensorFlow.js
thirdParties.notes: v4.22.0 - ML runtime backing UpscalerJS/ESRGAN on-device upscaling.

thirdParties.name: UpscalerJS + ESRGAN
thirdParties.notes: v1.0.0 (+ esrgan-slim@1.0.0) - on-device AI image upscaling x2.

thirdParties.name: Canvas Confetti
thirdParties.notes: Canvas-based confetti (jsDelivr @1.9.3, lazy-loaded) for celebration/success feedback.

thirdParties.name: Filerobot Image Editor
thirdParties.notes: On-device image editor (crop/rotate/filters/annotate/watermark/resize), jsDelivr @4, Vietnamese localized. Lazy-loaded.

thirdParties.name: html2canvas
thirdParties.notes: HTML to canvas rendering (jsDelivr @1.4.1, lazy-loaded) for image/print export.

thirdParties.name: JsBarcode
thirdParties.notes: Barcode generation (Code128 variant, jsDelivr @3.11.6) for bill/receipt printing.

thirdParties.name: jsPDF
thirdParties.notes: PDF generation from HTML/canvas (jsDelivr @2.5.2) for bill/receipt export.

thirdParties.name: Lottie Web
thirdParties.notes: lottie_light v5.12.2 (SVG-only ~150KB) for empty-state/success/error animations. Lazy-loaded across Web 2.0.

thirdParties.name: MoneyPrinterTurbo
thirdParties.notes: Inspiration/ported workflow concepts for video-maker (topic to script to stock footage to TTS to subtitles). On-device, no server dependency for base features.

thirdParties.name: Motion (Framer Motion)
thirdParties.notes: v11 animation library (spring physics, easing) for scroll/entrance effects + video-maker scene transitions.

thirdParties.name: opencv.js (@techstark/opencv-js)
thirdParties.notes: Prebuilt WASM (~11MB, v4.11.0-release.1) on-device CV (Canny + contour) for pack counting. Lazily loaded. (Trước đây từng nạp dạng CDN OpenCV.js cổ điển — nay dùng @techstark/opencv-js.)

thirdParties.name: QRCode.js
thirdParties.notes: QR code generation (jsDelivr gh master) for customer linking + payment codes.

thirdParties.name: ReceiptLine
thirdParties.notes: Bill/receipt rendering to printer commands or SVG. Vendored copy (do not modify, update from npm only).

thirdParties.name: Sec-ant/barcode-detector
thirdParties.notes: BarcodeDetector API ponyfill (native Android, ZXing-C++ WASM fallback iOS/Firefox). On-device QR/DataMatrix/PDF417/EAN/Code128 decode.

thirdParties.name: SheetJS (XLSX)
thirdParties.notes: Excel/CSV parse + export (v0.20.3 / v0.18.5, jsDelivr). Reports, data export, product import.

thirdParties.name: tesseract.js
thirdParties.notes: On-device WASM OCR for printed package-label text (multi-language incl. Vietnamese). Lazy-loaded on camera overlay.

thirdParties.name: Google Cloud Vision API
thirdParties.costDetail: Free tier ~1000 units/month; pay-per-use above. Text extraction + image analysis.
thirdParties.notes: OCR text extraction and image analysis (cloud) for video-maker.

thirdParties.name: Google Maps
thirdParties.costDetail: Pay-per-use. Referenced but may not be actively used.
thirdParties.notes: maps.google.com reference; likely vestigial / not actively invoked.

thirdParties.name: Goong.io Geocoding
thirdParties.costDetail: Vietnamese geocoding; free tier with key, paid above quota.
thirdParties.notes: Vietnamese address geocoding, auto-detect delivery addresses.

thirdParties.name: J&T Express Tracking
thirdParties.costDetail: Shipping tracking integration, no key.
thirdParties.notes: Shipment tracking integration for J&T Express.

thirdParties.name: SePay Payment Gateway
thirdParties.costDetail: Bank transfer signal API + webhook; fees vary by transaction. Two independent channels (shop vs Home).
thirdParties.notes: Bank transfer tracking + webhook balance reconciliation. Shop channel (balance_history) and Home channel (balance_history_home) are independent; both Web 1.0 pool but consumed by Web 2.0 wallet UI.

thirdParties.name: VietQR (vietqr.io)
thirdParties.costDetail: Free QR code generation.
thirdParties.notes: Vietnamese banking QR generator (vietqr.io print template) for customer payment collection.

thirdParties.name: Pexels Stock Media API
thirdParties.costDetail: Free API key, unlimited photos/videos. Multi-key rotation (up to 10).
thirdParties.notes: Primary stock photo/video source for MoneyPrinterTurbo video footage. Server-side key rotation.

thirdParties.name: Pixabay Stock Media API
thirdParties.costDetail: Free API key, unlimited media. Multi-key rotation (up to 10).
thirdParties.notes: Fallback stock photo/video source (after Pexels). Server-side key rotation.

thirdParties.name: Unsplash Images
thirdParties.costDetail: Free image API, no key required.
thirdParties.notes: Background images for photo-studio (images.unsplash.com), auto-format/crop/fit query params.

thirdParties.name: ElevenLabs TTS
thirdParties.costDetail: Free tier ~10k credits/month per key; commercial use requires paid. Multi-key round-robin with 1h cooldown on 401/quota. Rate-limited 30 req/min per IP.
thirdParties.notes: TTS (eleven_flash_v2_5 Vietnamese), sound effects (/sound), STT (/stt), voice isolation (/isolate). baseURL https://api.elevenlabs.io/v1. Voice Design is paid-only (dormant).

thirdParties.name: VieNeu-TTS (Voice Cloning)
thirdParties.notes: Vietnamese voice cloning v3 Turbo with emotion tags. Self-hosted on shop machines (Python FastAPI + cloudflared tunnel); registry endpoint /api/web2-vieneu-registry/list auto-discovers online machines.

thirdParties.name: VITS-web (Piper TTS)
thirdParties.notes: v1.0.3 Vietnamese TTS (Rhasspy Piper voice engine), runs on-device in browser.

thirdParties.name: Vivibe / Lucy Lab TTS Pro
thirdParties.costDetail: Free tier account + paid upgrades, credits-based. Multi-key round-robin with 1h cooldown. Max 5000 chars/request.
thirdParties.notes: Async job-based TTS (JSON-RPC at api.lucylab.io). Route obfuscated as /api/web2-tts-pro and labeled 'Giọng AI Pro' to hide provider from frontend (per user request 2026-06-22).

thirdParties.name: Vietnamese Provinces Database
thirdParties.costDetail: Dataset tĩnh MIT — bundle web2/shared/data/vn-units.json (~143KB), lazy-load qua GitHub Pages, KHÔNG backend/route.
thirdParties.notes: Đơn vị hành chính VN 2 cấp (Tỉnh/TP → Phường/Xã, 34 tỉnh · 3321 phường/xã) theo nghị định 30/2026/QH16 (hiệu lực 30/04/2026, bỏ cấp Quận/Huyện từ 01/07/2025). Nguồn cho Web2VnAddress (bộ chọn địa chỉ phụ thuộc dùng chung). Regen: node scripts/gen-vn-address-data.js.
